sub_modules.conv1d_tap_window: Pure combinational tap selector that presents the current input sample and four stored delay samples as the five FIR window taps.
sub_modules.conv1d_fir5_mac: Pure combinational fixed 5-tap multiply-accumulate block using hardcoded coefficients 2, 8, 12, 8, 2.
sub_modules.conv1d_gain_shift: Pure combinational normalization block that right-shifts the MAC result by GAIN_W and returns the extended-width filtered sample.
